'''Krail 210 personal armor''' was a type of full-body [[battle armor]] complete with helmet; it was the armor of choice worn by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Noval Garaint]].

Garaint's modified armor was a reinforced set of armor with power suit booster and an [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd]] [[Whisper (jet pack)|Whisper jet pack]]. The suit included a fully integrated on-board [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] pack with stress-reinforced blast helmet, integral dual [[force blade]]s, integral line slinger with attached [[magnetic grapple]] and winch, and a sealed environment and atmosphere filter. A [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] holster, [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]] pouch and chest-brackets for [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] rounded out the kit.

The more common version was a favorite of private security forces, bounty hunters, and people who wanted custom armor. Easily customizable, this suit also came with a helmet package, jetpack, liquid cable dispenser, and vacuum seals.<ref name="SAV" />
